hero.title: PRECISION. POWER. PERFORMANCE.
hero.subtitle: The CRÉNOT smart scale. Engineered for athletes. 14 advanced body metrics in one sleek, monolithic glass design.

philosophy.quote: YOUR BODY IS AN ENGINE. MEASURE IT LIKE ONE.
philosophy.author: - CRÉNOT SPORTS

metrics.title: 14 CORE METRICS
metrics.desc: Go beyond weight. Analyze your entire body composition with clinical-grade accuracy.

tech.title: DUAL-FREQUENCY BIA SENSOR
tech.desc: Utilizing high and low frequencies to penetrate cell membranes, delivering absolute precision in tracking muscle hypertrophy and fat loss.

app.title: SEAMLESS SYNC
app.desc: Bluetooth 5.0 connects instantly to the CRÉNOT Health App. Syncs with Apple Health & Google Fit. Visualize your progress.
